sentences.text: Thank you for calling Richmond Property Services. Please be advised your call may be recorded for quality assurance. If you know your party's extension, please enter it now. If you are calling with a comment or concern, please press one for our company directory, please press eight, please press zero to reach an operator or the general mailbox.
